ground_truth.title: Yoga | The Guardian
ground_truth.main_content: A Guardian collection of yoga-related articles including: Understanding the role of fascia in keeping the body healthy; 17 experts' top tips on how to stay motivated; A natural rubber yoga mat review (JadeYoga Harmony) that lasted a decade of daily practice; A personal story about overcoming depression through yoga; Advice on coping with terrible night's sleep; A story about yoga classes resuming at San Diego beach after a court ruling that yoga is 'protected speech'; Articles spanning December 2025, October 2025, September 2025, July 2025, June 2025, and earlier months.
with: Understanding the role of fascia in keeping the body healthy
Start small, keep a log, picture the end result: 17 experts' top tips on how to stay motivated
This natural rubber yoga mat lasted me a decade of daily practice
A moment that changed me: I clapped my hands and hit the brakes on years of depression
Yoga classes resume at San Diego beach as court says they are 'protected speech'
